issues.comment: The second branch of the `deleteMany` OR condition (`{ retryCount: { gt: 1 } }`) is missing a `method: WorkflowMethods.SMS` filter. This causes the SMS cron job to delete WorkflowReminder records of ALL method types (EMAIL, WHATSAPP, AI_PHONE_CALL) where retryCount > 1, not just SMS reminders. This is especially damaging because email and WhatsApp schedulers allow up to 3 retries (retryCount < 3), so reminders at retryCount === 2 would be prematurely deleted before those handlers can make their third attempt. The fix is to add `method: WorkflowMethods.SMS` to the second OR branch.
